app.name: Cortéa
home.upgrade_description: Practise every region, hear The Counsel without restraint, and refine every pillar of etiquette.
mirror.subtitle: A private appraisal of your presentation through the lens of occasion and rank.
mirror.access_prompt: The Mirror is reserved for those of Ambassador standing. Elevate your membership to gain access.
welcome.hero_subtitle: Elevate your communication and etiquette across cultures. Learn the traditions of different regions, refine your responses to every social occasion, and build stronger, more meaningful relationships — wherever in the world you find yourself.
welcome.module_atelier_desc: Scenario-based practice dissecting real social situations — from boardroom introductions to diplomatic dinners.
welcome.module_counsel_desc: A discreet adviser answering the etiquette questions one hesitates to ask aloud — from table protocol to professional correspondence.
welcome.module_compass_desc: A curated cultural atlas mapping the unwritten rules and customs of societies worldwide.
welcome.audience_section_title: Cortéa is for everyone who wishes to be understood
welcome.audience_professional_body: For navigating cross-cultural negotiations, client dinners, and boardroom protocol with confidence and authority.
welcome.audience_curious_body: For understanding the traditions, etiquette, and unwritten rules of cultures beyond your own.
welcome.audience_refined_body: For those already at ease in refined circles who seek the distinctions that separate the polished from the merely presentable.
welcome.audience_everyday_body: For anyone wanting more confident, respectful contact with people from different backgrounds and generations.
welcome.foundation_sentence: Cortéa draws on canonical works spanning etiquette history from Erasmus to Debrett's, cultural anthropology from Hofstede and Hall, behavioural psychology, and comparative studies of manners across social strata — synthesised into one practical framework.
welcome.result_msg_flawless: You answered all three correctly. Your instincts are already well-formed. Cortéa will refine what is already exceptional.
welcome.result_msg_accomplished: Two of three — a commendable result. Cortéa will attend to the finer distinctions that separate the accomplished from the distinguished.
welcome.result_msg_promising: One of three. There is rich ground ahead. Cortéa will guide you through the invisible codes that govern the highest circles.
welcome.result_msg_nascent: The conventions of refinement are not born but cultivated. Cortéa exists for precisely this journey.
welcome.join_body: Continue your study of refinement. Track your Noble Score, train across five pillars of etiquette, and consult the Counsel on any situation — from dining in Paris to negotiating in Tokyo.

compass.cc.z1.desc: Religious observance, holidays, gift-giving, taboos and colour symbolism.
compass.cc.z2.title: Interaction & Language
compass.cc.z2.desc: Forms of address, greeting rituals, conversation register and non-verbal style.

compass.cc.z3.desc: Cutlery, seating, the bill, dining sounds, posture and drinks etiquette.
compass.cc.z4.title: Relationships & Status

compass.cc.z5.title: Appearance
compass.cc.z5.desc: Dress codes, modesty, eye contact, personal space and touch etiquette.
compass.communication_presence_note: How presence, delivery, and language combine to convey distinction in this culture.

counsel.situation_placeholder: Describe where you are going, e.g. a formal dinner in Tokyo, a business meeting in Dubai…
counsel.situation_hint: This context will be shared with The Counsel to calibrate its guidance.
mirror.lock.teaser: The Mirror analyses your presentation through the lens of occasion and rank — discreet, on-device, and precise.
compass.lock.teaser: Unlock the etiquette codes, cardinal taboos, and cultural compass of this region — essential knowledge for those who move between worlds.
atelier.lock.teaser: Advanced scenarios immerse you in the nuanced demands of distinction — complex dilemmas, competing conventions, and the invisible codes that separate the refined from the exceptional.
welcome.quiz_q1_scenario: You have been invited to dinner at a private residence. The invitation states seven o'clock. At what time should you arrive?
welcome.quiz_q1_opt_a: Six forty-five — to assist with final preparations.
welcome.quiz_q1_opt_b: Seven o'clock precisely — punctuality is a virtue.
welcome.quiz_q1_opt_c: Between seven ten and seven fifteen — the customary quarter.
welcome.quiz_q1_explanation: Arriving slightly after the stated hour — the so-called 'gentleman's quarter' — allows the host to conclude their preparations with composure. Arriving early is considered an imposition.
welcome.quiz_q2_scenario: You are seated at a formally laid table. Bread rolls are placed on either side of your setting. Which is yours?
welcome.quiz_q2_explanation: The mnemonic BMW guides the formal table: Bread to the left, Meal in the centre, Water and Wine to the right. The bread roll to your left is always yours.
welcome.quiz_q3_scenario: During a business dinner in Tokyo, your host presents their meishi — business card — with both hands and a respectful bow. How do you respond?
welcome.quiz_q3_opt_a: Accept with one hand and a warm smile, then set it aside.
welcome.quiz_q3_opt_b: Accept with both hands, study it attentively, and place it respectfully on the table.
welcome.quiz_q3_opt_c: Accept graciously and immediately reciprocate with your own card.
welcome.quiz_q3_explanation: In Japanese business culture, the meishi is an extension of the person. It must be received with both hands, examined with genuine attention, and placed carefully on the table — never written upon or pocketed immediately.
counsel.lock.teaser: The Counsel is your discreet guide across etiquette domains — from the formal table to digital correspondence.
situations.lock.teaser: Situations guides you through the unspoken expectations of every social setting — dinners, ceremonies, and formal occasions.
welcome.disclaimer: This tool is developed on the basis of multiple acclaimed works, including psychological studies on social interaction and the study of manners across the different strata of society.

home.no_badges: No distinctions yet — begin your first learning track
sensory.title: Sensory Awareness
sensory.subtitle: A discreet ambient monitor. Select your venue context and receive a haptic alert when your environment exceeds the appropriate register.
sensory.gated_subtitle: A discreet ambient monitor that alerts you when your environment — or your voice — exceeds the register appropriate for your setting.
sensory.exceeds_range: Volume exceeds {{venue}} register — please lower your voice.
sensory.awaiting_desc: Select your venue context and activate monitoring. You will receive a discreet haptic alert when ambient sound exceeds the appropriate threshold.
sensory.mic_disabled: Microphone access is suspended by your Privacy settings.
sensory.mic_denied: Microphone access was denied. Please allow microphone access in your browser settings.
sensory.privacy_note: All audio analysis is performed locally — nothing is recorded or transmitted.
navigator.title: The Navigator
navigator.subtitle: Log your upcoming journeys. Cultural briefings are delivered at precisely the right moment — before you land, and when you do.
navigator.gated_subtitle: Plan your international travel with discreet cultural briefings delivered at the right moment — 7 days out, 3 days out, and on the day of arrival.
navigator.no_trips: No upcoming journeys logged. Add your first trip to receive timed cultural briefings.
inner_circle.title: The Inner Circle
inner_circle.subtitle: A discreet view of Ambassador presence across the globe. All data is anonymised and aggregated by city.
inner_circle.gated_subtitle: A discreet view of the Cortéa Ambassador network — presence by city, anonymised and precise. Your calling card awaits.
inner_circle.privacy_note: This calling card is visible to fellow Ambassadors only. Your email and personal data are never shared.
inner_circle.map_note: Each cell represents anonymous member density. Hover to reveal the city. Data is refreshed periodically.
inner_circle.data_note: Member presence is aggregated and anonymised by city. Individual location data is never collected, stored, or shared.
privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.subtitle: Your personal sensor controls and data preferences. All settings are stored locally on your device and take effect immediately.
privacy.incognito_desc: Incognito Mode disables all sensors simultaneously — camera, microphone, and location. Features requiring sensor access will be suspended until you deactivate it.
privacy.camera_desc: Used by The Mirror for on-device dress code analysis. No images are stored or transmitted.
privacy.mic_desc: Used by Sensory Awareness for ambient volume monitoring. No audio is recorded or transmitted.
privacy.location_desc: Used to suggest your etiquette region based on geography. Only the detected country is used — never precise coordinates.
privacy.cleanup_desc: Your scenario answers and consultation responses are cached locally to maintain session continuity. You may clear this data at any time — your Noble Score and progress on the server are unaffected.
privacy.auto_cleanup_desc: Automatically remove cached scenario answers whenever you sign out of Cortéa.
privacy.remember_prefs_desc: When enabled, your privacy settings are kept on the server and restored automatically the next time you sign in.
privacy.settings_note: Privacy settings are synced to your account and take effect immediately across all your devices. Use the Sync button to pull the latest settings at any time.
navigator.first_trip_teaser: Add your first trip to begin.
navigator.lock_teaser: Receive timed cultural briefings: core values at D-7, table manners at D-3, and greeting protocol on arrival day.
navigator.tier_teaser: Know exactly what to do — and what never to do — before you land. Cultural intelligence, delivered on schedule.
privacy.data_camera_detail: Never recorded, stored, or transmitted. MobileNet analysis runs entirely in your browser.
privacy.data_mic_detail: Never recorded. Only a decibel level reading is computed locally — no audio leaves your device.
privacy.data_location_detail: Country-level detection only, stored in session memory (not permanent storage). Never transmitted without consent.
privacy.data_scenarios_detail: Stored locally in your browser for session continuity. Your score is recorded server-side independently.
privacy.data_calling_card_detail: Visible only to verified Ambassadors. Your email and personal details are never shared.

atelier.track.no_content_desc: Learning tracks for this region are in preparation.
atelier.track.mastered_desc: You have fully mastered this learning track.
atelier.track.repeat_message: Let's revisit this — same type of questions again.
atelier.track.study_acknowledge: I've read this — show the question
atelier.track.study_gate_hint: Read the context above, then acknowledge to unlock the answer options.
mentor.correct.young.0: Excellent instinct — you caught something many overlook entirely. Keep that sharpness.
mentor.correct.young.1: Spot on. You read the situation with real clarity — that kind of awareness will serve you well.
mentor.correct.young.2: Precisely right. There is something quietly impressive about choosing well under uncertainty.
mentor.correct.young.3: Well chosen. Your judgement here shows more polish than most at your stage.
mentor.correct.adult.0: An elegant choice — one that demonstrates discernment beyond the ordinary.
mentor.correct.adult.1: Precisely as a person of your standing would respond. Your instincts serve you well.
mentor.correct.adult.2: Your selection reflects a cultivated understanding. One would expect no less.
mentor.correct.adult.3: A commendable choice. The subtlety of your judgement does not go unnoticed.
mentor.correct.mature.0: Your selection is entirely correct — and, one suspects, informed by the kind of experience that cannot be taught.
mentor.correct.mature.1: Precisely right. There is a settled assurance in your choice that speaks well of your understanding.
mentor.correct.mature.2: Correct in every respect. The refined mind recognises what the untrained eye misses.
mentor.correct.mature.3: A distinguished choice. Your judgement reflects the quiet confidence that comes with real cultivation.
mentor.incorrect.young.0: Not quite — but this is exactly the kind of situation worth understanding early. Here is the thinking behind the better approach.
mentor.incorrect.young.1: The preferred choice was a step away. At your stage, refining these instincts is precisely the work.
mentor.incorrect.young.2: Close — the distinction is subtle but important. Let me show you where the difference lies.
mentor.incorrect.young.3: Not the ideal path here, but recognising why matters more than the slip. Here is what to carry forward.
mentor.incorrect.adult.0: Allow me to offer a gentle refinement — the more elegant path was perhaps not immediately apparent.
mentor.incorrect.adult.1: In circles where such situations arise, the preferred approach is slightly different. Let us refine this together.
mentor.incorrect.adult.2: A thoughtful attempt. The nuance here lies in the detail — permit me to illuminate it.
mentor.incorrect.adult.3: Even the most accomplished individuals encounter situations that invite further reflection. Here is how one might approach it.
mentor.incorrect.mature.0: An understandable approach — though the convention here is perhaps more particular than it first appears. Let me offer the refinement.
mentor.incorrect.mature.1: The preferred choice carries a subtlety that is easy to miss. Even in experienced hands, these distinctions reward attention.
mentor.incorrect.mature.2: Not the conventional path, though one appreciates the reasoning. Here is where the accepted approach differs.
mentor.incorrect.mature.3: A slight deviation from the established form. These finer points are precisely where the truly cultivated distinguish themselves.

counsel.skills.section_subtitle: Principles of graceful interaction — from first words to final impressions.
counsel.skills.active_listening.name: Active Listening
counsel.skills.active_listening.principl: True understanding arrives only when you stop formulating your reply and give your full attention to the other person.
counsel.skills.active_listening.body: Genuine listening means quieting your internal commentary and attending not just to words, but to the pauses between them. When someone feels truly heard, trust deepens far more quickly than any polished response could achieve. Reserve your observations until the other person has completely finished — and resist the urge to fill the silence.
counsel.skills.body_language.name: Reading Body Language
counsel.skills.body_language.principle: What is left unspoken often communicates more than the words themselves.
counsel.skills.body_language.body: Posture, eye contact, and the subtle angle of shoulders reveal emotional states that carefully chosen words may conceal. A gracious host reads these signals to know when a guest needs rescuing from a stale conversation or when a visitor quietly wishes to depart. Mirroring open posture invites candour and signals that you are a safe presence.
counsel.skills.graceful_disagreement.pri: One may hold a firm conviction and still speak of it with warmth and without apology.
counsel.skills.graceful_disagreement.bod: Disagreement handled with care is not weakness — it is confidence. Begin by acknowledging what is reasonable in the opposing view before presenting your own. Phrases such as "I see it rather differently" allow you to preserve both the relationship and your integrity, without either capitulating or confronting.
counsel.skills.art_of_introduction.name: The Considered Introduction
counsel.skills.art_of_introduction.princ: How you introduce two people shapes the first impressions they form of each other — and of you.
counsel.skills.art_of_introduction.body: Formal convention is clear: introduce the lesser-known guest to the more distinguished one. The art, however, lies beyond protocol. Offer a brief, genuine detail about each person that sparks natural conversation — evidence that you have truly listened to them. An unhurried introduction is a quiet act of generosity.
counsel.skills.table_conversation.name: Table Conversation
counsel.skills.table_conversation.princi: A good conversationalist gives attention freely and asks questions that make others feel interesting.
counsel.skills.table_conversation.body: Dinner table dialogue is best sustained by curiosity rather than performance. Draw out quieter guests with open questions and resist the pull to monopolise the exchange. The goal is not to impress but to create moments where everyone leaves the table feeling they have contributed something worth remembering.
counsel.skills.digital_conduct.name: Digital Conduct
counsel.skills.digital_conduct.principle: The same courtesy that governs the drawing room governs the inbox and the message thread.
counsel.skills.digital_conduct.body: Promptness, clarity, and tone all carry weight in written correspondence. Replying thoughtfully — even briefly — signals respect for another's time. Avoid writing in haste or frustration: a message sent cannot be recalled, and in digital communication, tone is far more easily misread than in conversation.
counsel.skills.graceful_exit.name: The Graceful Exit
counsel.skills.graceful_exit.principle: Knowing when and how to leave a conversation is as important as knowing how to begin one.
counsel.skills.graceful_exit.body: A well-timed departure preserves goodwill and leaves a positive final impression. Signal your intention with a warm closing remark before withdrawing; avoid the habit of lingering after a natural ending point has passed. The graceful exit is not retreat — it is attentiveness to the rhythm of the encounter.
counsel.skills.language_of_gratitude.pri: Expressed appreciation, when specific and sincere, strengthens the bonds that sophisticated social life depends upon.
counsel.skills.language_of_gratitude.bod: Generic thanks evaporate from memory; specific thanks endure. Name precisely what you appreciated — the care taken in an arrangement, the patience shown during difficulty, the generosity of a well-timed recommendation. A brief handwritten note carries a weight that digital messages rarely match.
home.streak_hint: Complete a scenario or quest each day to maintain your streak.

wardrobe.subtitle: Your Social Avatar evolves as your Noble Score rises. Master the Appearance pillar to unlock garments from across the world.

profile.legal_privacy_desc: Read our full privacy policy covering GDPR, data processing, your rights, and behavioural intelligence disclosures.
cookie.banner_text: Cortéa uses session cookies and local storage for authentication and preferences only — no tracking or advertising.
gdpr.section_desc: Manage your personal data and exercise your privacy rights under GDPR (Art. 15–21).
gdpr.export_desc: Download a structured JSON file containing your account details, Noble Score history, behavioural profile, and scenario progress (Art. 20 GDPR — Right to Portability).
gdpr.profiling_desc: Cortéa analyses your scenario responses to build your Refinement Compass (Bolton, EQ, Mehrabian). You may object to this profiling at any time (Art. 21 GDPR).
gdpr.rights_intro: Under GDPR (Art. 15–21) you hold the following rights:
gdpr.right_access: Right of access (Art. 15) — request a copy of your data via export above
gdpr.right_rectification: Right to rectification (Art. 16) — correct your data via the profile fields above
gdpr.right_erasure: Right to erasure (Art. 17) — delete your account in the Danger Zone below
gdpr.right_restriction: Right to restriction (Art. 18) — contact us to pause processing
gdpr.right_portability: Right to portability (Art. 20) — download your data with the button above
gdpr.right_objection: Right to object (Art. 21) — pause behavioural profiling with the toggle above
gdpr.contact: For any data request e-mail privacy@cortea.app — we respond within 30 calendar days.
